source: NANOGrav 15-yr (Agazie et al. 2023) + EPTA DR2 (Antoniadis et al. 2023) + LIGO O3 stochastic upper bound
notes: PTA stochastic background detection at f ~ nHz with characteristic Ω_GW ≈ 10^-9. Whether this is from supermassive-black-hole binaries or cosmic-string remnants is debated. As a constraint on cosmic strings, a more conservative upper bound Ω_GW < 10^-9 is widely cited. Detailed string-tension bounds depend on string-network evolution model.
